steps.title: Recognize the population density formula
steps.content: Population density is the total population divided by the total area. We need to divide the number of raccoons by the area.

steps.title: Calculate the density
steps.content:
Divide 2,358 raccoons by 131 square miles:
$$\frac{2,358}{131} = 18$$
The population density is 18 raccoons per square mile. That matches choice A — A is correct.
